paragraphs.text: CHAPTER 2
SONG OF DEGREES
DAVID: Yes, ABBA FATHER, precious HOLY SPIRIT and LORD JESUS, I

understood at last what you have kept reminding me through SHEKINAIH that I must take my calling seriously and treasure this life You have given me and to make it count for eternity and to reach my full stature in you, to be a perfect man in according to Your standard of measurement, and to fulfil my great destiny in you.

ABBA FATHER, the need for the Brides to produce the fruits of righteousness of: Peace and Joy, Meekness of love, Lowliness of mind, Yieldedness, and Faith in THE ELOHIM unto holiness, or the need for the Anointed Ones to produce fruit of righteousness of: Faith, Joy, Patience, Mercy, Hope, Love, Peace, unto holiness, through many tribulations, persecutions, oppressions, offences and testing in order to reach the gate of Heavenly Zion, is there any bible references for them?

JESUS: The Songs of Degrees of Psalms 120 to 134 are witnesses for them. They depict the trials and the rewards of my last days' Brides and Anointed ones as they ascend to Heavenly Mount Zion to be part of My bride. They reveal whom, where, how it will unfold as scripted by My FATHER, THE EHYEH who is the Mastermind of their destiny and of the whole universe and its inhabitants.
David, can you read Psalms 120:1-7 and then tell Me what does Strong's Dictionary say concerning the meaning of the word, "Degree" in Psa 120:1?

DAVID: Psa 120:1 A Song of degrees (H4069 "maalah" Ascent). In my distress (H6869 "tsarah" tribulation) I cried unto THE YAHWEH, and he heard me. Psa 120:2 Deliver my soul, O YAHWEH, from lying lips, and from a deceitful tongue. Psa 120:3 What shall be given unto thee? or what shall be done unto thee, thou false tongue? Psa 120:4 Sharp arrows of the mighty, with coals of juniper. Psa 120:5 Woe is me, that I sojourn in Mesech, that I dwell in the tents of Kedar! Psa 120:6 My soul hath long dwelt with him that hateth peace. Psa 120:7 I am for peace: but when I speak, they are for war.
The word "degrees" H4069 "maalah" means stairs, steps and ascent. Literally, it is the act of a journey to a higher place.
JESUS: Yes, this ascension is to the Heavenly Mount Zion, the city of the King where I, JESUS, the Great King of kings will be waiting for My Brides and Anointed Ones, My brothers and sisters.

Psalms 120 :1-7 depicts how My Brides and Anointed Ones who are residents in Soviet's rule Countries and Middle Eastern Countries shall suffer as they ascend to My Heavenly Mountain for their perfection in holiness. False witnesses will be brought out to accuse them of breaking the law. These intended hostility; tribulations and persecutions are instigated by Satan but are scripted by My FATHER to purify them unto peace in holiness to be counted worthy for My Kingdom, the Heavenly Mount Zion.
David, can you now read Psalms 121:1-8?

DAVID: Psa 121:1 A Song of degrees (Ascent). I will lift up mine eyes unto the mountains, from whence cometh my help. Psa 121:2 My help cometh from THE YAHWEH, which made heaven and earth. Psa 121:3 He will not suffer thy foot to be moved: he that keepeth thee will not slumber. Psa 121:4 Behold, he that keepeth Israel shall neither slumber nor sleep. Psa 121:5 THE YAHWEH

is thy keeper: THE YAHWEH is thy shade upon thy right hand. Psa 121:6 The sun shall not smite thee by day, nor the moon by night. Psa 121:7 THE YAHWEH shall preserve thee from all evil: he shall preserve thy soul. Psa 121:8 THE YAHWEH shall preserve thy going out and thy coming in from this time forth, and even for evermore.

JESUS: As long as My potential Brides and the Anointed Ones set their eyes on My righteousness in their ascension to My Heavenly Mount Zion, We shall surely preserve them from the evil plagues which will come upon the proud and haughty nations in the day of the slaughter through Our glorious appearing in The Angel of Our Presence, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT BY US, THE ELIJAH, THE MAJOR and THE MINOR

respectively, who was, and is, and is to come. As Our moon and sun respectively, We shall send both of you to sift the nations with the sieve of vanity. We shall cause Our glorious voice in both of you to be heard and shall shew the lighting down of Our arm, with the indignation of Our anger, and with the flame of a devouring fire, with scattering, and tempest, and hailstones upon the Antichrist's kings and rulers of the earth, who set themselves and take counsel together against Us and Our Brides and Anointed Ones. They shall all be thrown into the lake of fire (Rev 19:20).

Isa 30:25 And there shall be upon every high mountain, and upon every high hill, rivers and streams of waters in the day of the great slaughter, when the towers fall. Isa 30:26 Moreover the light of the moon shall be as the light of the sun, and the light of the sun shall be sevenfold, as the light of seven days, in the day that THE YAHWEH bindeth up the breach of his people, and healeth the stroke of their wound. Isa 30:27 Behold, the name of THE YAHWEH cometh from far, burning with his anger, and the burden thereof is heavy: his lips are full of indignation, and his tongue as a devouring fire: Isa 30:28 And his breath, as an overflowing stream, shall reach to the midst of the neck, to sift the nations with the sieve of vanity: and there shall be a bridle in the jaws of the people, causing them to err. Isa 30:29 Ye shall have a song, as in the night when a holy solemnity is kept; and gladness of heart, as when one goeth with a pipe to come into the mountain of THE YAHWEH, to the mighty One of Israel. Isa 30:30 And THE YAHWEH shall cause his glorious voice to be heard, and shall shew the lighting down of his arm, with the indignation of his anger, and with the flame of a devouring fire, with scattering, and tempest, and hailstones. Isa 30:31 For through the voice of THE YAHWEH shall the Assyrian be beaten down, which smote with a rod. Isa 30:32 And in every place where the grounded staff shall pass, which THE YAHWEH shall lay upon him, it shall be with tabrets and harps: and in battles of shaking will he fight with it. Isa 30:33 For Tophet is ordained of old; yea, for the king it is prepared; he hath made it deep and large: the pile thereof is fire and much wood; the breath of THE YAHWEH, like a stream of brimstone, doth kindle it.
David, can you read Psalms 122:1-9?

DAVID: Psa 122:1 A Song of degrees (Ascent) of David. I was glad when they said unto me, Let us go into the house of THE YAHWEH. Psa 122:2 Our feet shall stand within thy gates, O Jerusalem. Psa 122:3 Jerusalem is builded as a city that is compact together: Psa 122:4 Whither the tribes go up, the tribes of THE YAH, unto the witness (H5715 "eduth") of Israel, to give thanks unto the name of THE YAHWEH. Psa 122:5 For there are set thrones of judgment, the thrones of the house of David. Psa 122:6 Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: they shall prosper that love thee. Psa 122:7 Peace be within thy walls, and prosperity within thy palaces. Psa 122:8 For my brethren and companions' sakes, I will now say, Peace be within thee. Psa 122:9 Because of the house of THE YAHWEH our ELOHIM I will seek thy good.

JESUS: The ascent is to My house, the city of Heavenly Jerusalem, to be with My witnesses, the children of resurrection and to give thanks unto THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT BY US, THE ELIJAH, THE
MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, representing Us, THE TRINITY.
David, can you now read Psalms 123:1-4?

DAVID: Psa 123:1 A Song of degrees (Ascent). Unto thee lift I up mine eyes, O thou that dwellest in the heavens. Psa 123:2 Behold, as the eyes of servants look unto the hand of their masters, and as the eyes of a maiden unto the hand of her mistress; so our eyes wait upon THE YAHWEH our ELOHIM, until that he have mercy upon us. Psa 123:3 Have mercy upon us, O YAHWEH, have mercy upon us: for we are exceedingly filled with contempt. Psa 123:4 Our soul is exceedingly filled with the scorning of those that are at ease, and with the contempt of the proud.

JESUS: It is purposed by My FATHER that the hearts of My Brides and Anointed Ones must be broken through reproaches unto lowliness of mind by being derided and humiliated by the haughty ones of the Antichrist's Nations if they are to ascend to Heavenly Mount Zion unto holiness.
David, can you now read Psalms 124:1-8?

DAVID: Psa 124:1 A Song of degrees (Ascent) of David. If it had not been THE YAHWEH who was on our side, now may Israel say; Psa 124:2 If it had not been THE YAHWEH who was on our side, when men rose up against us: Psa 124:3 Then they had swallowed us up quick, when their wrath was kindled against us: Psa 124:4 Then the waters had overwhelmed us, the stream had gone over our soul: Psa 124:5 Then the proud (H7293 "Rahab") waters had gone over our soul. Psa 124:6 Blessed be THE YAHWEH, who hath not given us as a prey to their teeth. Psa 124:7 Our soul is escaped as a bird out of the snare of the fowlers: the snare is broken, and we are escaped. Psa 124:8 Our help is in The Name of THE YAHWEH, who made heaven and earth.

JESUS: In the last days, Lucifer, the whore, through her spokesman, the ringleader of the ten kings, shall legislate law to persecute My potential Brides and Anointed Ones. The water from her mouth signifies peoples, multitudes, nations and tongues that are serving the Antichrist, Rahab, the proud dragon of the sea and only My righteous ones that runneth THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH, and I, represented by you, THE ANCIENT OF DAYS, THE MESSENGER SENT BY US, THE ELIJAH, THE
MAJOR and THE MINOR respectively, who was, and is, and is to come, who represent, "THE NAME OF THE YAHWEH" shall be taken to a safe place away from their persecution.

Rev 12:15 And the serpent cast out of his mouth water as a flood after the woman, that he might cause her to be carried away of the flood. Rev 12:16 And the earth helped the woman, and the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed up the flood which the dragon cast out of his mouth.

Rev 17:12 And the ten horns which thou sawest are ten kings, which have received no kingdom as yet; but receive power as kings one hour with the beast. Rev 17:13 These have one mind, and shall give their power and strength unto the beast. Rev 17:14 These shall make war with the Lamb, and the Lamb shall overcome them: for he is Lord of lords, and King of kings: and they that are with him are called, and chosen, and faithful. Rev 17:15 And he saith unto me, The waters which thou sawest, where the whore sitteth, are peoples, and multitudes, and nations, and tongues.
Pro 18:10 The Name of THE YAHWEH is a strong tower: the righteous runneth into it, and is set on high (H7682 "sagab" to be set on high, be inaccessibly high).

Satan, the great red dragon will try to kill you first but will fail; for you will be caught up unto My FATHER and to your throne and become a Metatron, The Angel of My Presence, and together with SHEKINAIH, as The Name of THE YAHWEH, you shall come with My resurrected holy ones to lift up My Brides to a safe haven away from the persecution of the flood (water of peoples, multitudes, nations and tongues that are serving the Antichrist, Rahab, the proud dragon of the sea) instigated by the spokesman (mouth of the serpent) and to be nourished for three and a half years from The Antichrist (face of the serpent).

Rev 12:13 And when the dragon saw that he was cast unto the earth, he persecuted the woman which brought forth the man child. Rev 12:14 And to the woman were given two wings of a great eagle, that she might fly into the wilderness, into her place, where she is nourished for a time, and times, and half a time, from the face of the serpent. Rev 12:15 And the serpent cast out of his mouth water as a flood after the woman, that he might cause her to be carried away of the flood. Rev 12:16 And the earth helped the woman, and the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed up the flood which the dragon cast out of his mouth. Rev 12:17 And the dragon was wroth with the woman, and went to make war with the remnant of her seed, which keep the commandments of THE ELOHIM, and have the testimony of JESUS CHRIST. Rev 12:1 And there appeared a great wonder in heaven; a woman clothed with the sun, and the moon under her feet, and upon her head a crown of twelve stars: Rev 12:2 And she being with child cried, travailing in birth, and pained to be delivered. Rev 12:3 And there appeared another wonder in heaven; and behold a great red dragon, having seven heads and ten horns, and seven crowns upon his heads. Rev 12:4 And his tail drew the third part of the stars of heaven, and did cast them to the earth: and the dragon stood before the woman, which was ready to be delivered, for to devour her child as soon as it was born. Rev 12:5 And she brought forth a man child, who was to rule all nations with a rod of iron: and her child was caught up unto THE ELOHIM, and to his throne.

Rev 12:13 And when the dragon saw that he was cast unto the earth, he persecuted the woman which brought forth the man child. Rev 12:14 And to the woman were given two wings of a great eagle, that she might fly into the wilderness, into her place, where she is nourished for a time, and times, and half a time, from the face of the serpent. Rev 12:15 And the serpent cast out of his mouth water as a flood after the woman, that he might cause her to be carried away of the flood. Rev 12:16 And the earth helped the woman, and the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed up the flood which the dragon cast out of his mouth. Rev 12:17 And the dragon was wroth with the woman, and went to make war with the remnant of her seed, which keep the commandments of THE ELOHIM, and have the testimony of JESUS CHRIST.

History will again repeat itself. THE SHE/HE, THE FATHER and THE HOLY SPIRIT represented by SHEKINAIH/JESUS represented by AARON K DAVID, THE DECREEING AND SEALING SWORD AND THE MAJOR EXECUTING SABRE/THE

MINOR COEXECUTING SABRE, our arm, and right hand man, shall again cut Rahab and wound the dragon and make waste (H2717 "charab" waste) the sea of peoples, multitudes, nations and tongues of the ten Antichrist nations to make a way for My redeemed Brides to pass over and ascended to My Holy Mount Zion with song of gladness and joy.

Isa 51:9 Awake, awake, put on strength, O arm of THE YAHWEH; awake, as in the ancient days, in the generations of old. Art thou not it that hath cut Rahab, and wounded the dragon? Isa 51:10 Art thou not it which hath dried(H2717 "charab" waste) the sea, the waters of the great deep; that hath made the depths of the sea a way for the ransomed to pass over? Isa 51:11 Therefore the redeemed of THE YAHWEH shall return, and come with singing unto Zion; and everlasting joy shall be upon their head: they shall obtain gladness and joy; and sorrow and mourning shall flee away.
David, can you now read Psalms 125:1-5?
